message:
fix(cli): restore run_health function signature and add stale fingerprint test

- Remove duplicate #[derive(Debug, Clone, ...)] on ActiveIndexRunDetails
- Restore run_health() function doc comment and signature that was
  truncated by a concurrent edit race
- Add state_meta_json_marks_lexical_fingerprint_mismatch_stale test
  verifying that a mismatched storage fingerprint correctly reports
  stale index status with a reason containing "fingerprint"
- Add semantic assertion to cli_robot test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
